title: The Nociceptive Withdrawal Reflex
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5o2nr","text":"Clinical protocol to evoke the nociceptive withdrawal reflex. This protocol describes how to define nociceptive withdrawal reflex thresholds, following the clinical technique and guidelines from Linköping University Hospital.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"7ldiu","text":"This protocol describes the use of electrical current applied to the skin of individuals. Approved equipment intended for electrical use on humans should be used in this protocol. The equipment should be handled by trained personnel only to ensure the safety of the individuals who are exposed to the electrical currents.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Penang, Malaysia","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1fss2","text":"Disc electrode, GVB-geliMED, Germany.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Start Natus Elite - Synergy EMG software program.
Choose the "NWR" protocol. Choose side (right foot).
Subject should be placed in a comfortabel seated position, with the legs hanging freely and feet above the ground. Place the ground electrode on the ankle.
Place the anode and cathode on the tibial anterior muscle, separated by 3cm.
Place the stimulating electrode under the foot sole, at the medial plantar dermatome, just under the head of metatarsal I.
To electrically stimulate, press the "Switch" button.

Start at a low stimulus intensity of 2mA and slowly increase in 3mA increments until a nociceptive withdrawal reflex can be visualized. Wait randomly for at least 10s in-between stimuli to evoke a surprising effect.
Repeat the stimulus at reflex intensity 3 times.
The stimulus intensity at which a reflex can be successfully evoked 3 times, is taken as the Nociceptive withdrawal reflex threshold.
creator: Oumie Thorell
